eas_text: A civil authority has issued A LOCAL AREA EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Ada; Canyon, ID; at 11:53 AM on MAY 26, 2026 Effective until 1:53 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: This is an activation of the Endangered Missing Person Alert system.  The Canyon County Sheriff's Office is looking for a missing person who was last seen in the area of Ridge Park Street in Caldwell and is believed to be in danger. He is a 15 year old male with brown hair and was last seen wearing a long red shirt and dark blue jeans. If you have any information on the where abouts of this missing person please contact the Canyon County Sheriff's Office at 208-454-7531.
